policies.v1Final: historical evidence after V2 cut; not the live semantic authority
policies.v2SourceOfTruth: V2 semantic contracts, capability definitions, UI semantics, proofs, and validator rules are the canonical source after cut
policies.driftPolicy: V2 code must not drift from capability definitions or contracts; drift is a validator failure
policies.changePolicy: Any post-V2 behaviour change must update capability definitions, contracts, permissions, validation, errors, events, operational semantics, environment semantics, UI semantics, proofs, and validator rules when the semantic class changes in the same change
policies.v1ReopenPolicy: V1 is not reopened except for evidence correction
requiredChangeCoupling: validator rules when semantic class changes
forbiddenChanges: code behaviour changes without semantic artefact updates
UI behaviour invented from generated components
new provider without environment and operational semantics
new capability without proof level and readiness model

requiredChangeSet: validator rules when a new semantic class is introduced
